issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: This issue incorrectly states "Missing mandatory customer name on the receipt" when the receipt is for a restaurant meal. issue_validation_scores.issue_description: Meal expenses are not tax exempt and will be grossed up
issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: This issue correctly identifies that meal expenses are subject to gross-up rules and accurately cites the relevant policy: "Domestic: maximum €26.40 per day tax-free (12 hours maximum). International: government per diem rates apply, daily rate may be increased but receipt required for amount above set rate to be tax-exempt." Since the total amount is €32, which exceeds the €26.40 tax-free limit, this is correctly categorized.

issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: This issue correctly identifies that travel expenses must be submitted using the travel report template, which is explicitly stated in the compliance rules for restaurant expenses under travel.
